description: Style Note No chance of making a fashion faux pas when you're carrying the wallet from Reid and Taylor clean, classic styling made of genuine, understated leather, this piece would also make a great gift. Featuring multiple card slots, this sleek wallet offers unbeatable practical style. Product Details Money holder style wallet with two flaps covering the flap inside Inner flap has two card holder slots on either side A pin to hold the money in place (it can be pulled up) Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
